labs.actionRequired: dose adjustment or discontinuation if hyperkalemia occurs
labs.clinicalContext: hyperkalemia risk with MRA therapy in CKD patients

labs.actionRequired: dose adjustment or discontinuation based on eGFR decline
labs.clinicalContext: eGFR thresholds for MRA initiation and monitoring in CKD

labRequirements.specialPopulationNotes: Use with eGFR >30 ml/min per 1.73 m² in most cases, some agents require eGFR >45 ml/min per 1.73 m²
labRequirements.sourceSnippet: Additional outcomes: AKI, hyperkalemia. Adults with CKD (G1-G5, G5D) and diabetes (T1D and T2D). Intervention: Mineralocorticoid receptor antagonists or direct renin inhibitors. Use with eGFR >30 ml/min per 1.73 m² or >45 ml/min per 1.73 m²
